scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/common build && bun run --cwd packages/openapi build && bun run --cwd packages/automation build && bun run --cwd packages/abtest build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/mcp build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/openapi test && bun run --cwd packages/automation test && bun run --cwd packages/abtest test && bun run --cwd apps/cli test && bun run --cwd packages/mcp test
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.lint:ttsc: bun run --cwd packages/abtest ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/automation ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/common ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/mcp ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/openapi ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd apps/cli ttsc --noEmit
scripts.format:ttsc: bun run --cwd packages/abtest ttsc format && bun run --cwd packages/automation ttsc format && bun run --cwd packages/common ttsc format && bun run --cwd packages/mcp ttsc format && bun run --cwd apps/cli ttsc format
scripts.check:ttsc: bun run --cwd packages/abtest ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/automation ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/common ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/mcp ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/openapi ttsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd apps/cli ttsc --noEmit
